_comment: EXAMPLE multi-host registry. Copy to .sandcastle/hosts.json and edit — the
REPLACE-ME values are deliberately non-functional so this file can never be
name          Label for the host, your choice (e.g. "hub", "vps").
transport     "local" = this machine. Anything else is an ssh alias, and
maxConcurrent Issues that host may work at once. Integer >= 1.
repoPath      REQUIRED for remote hosts: absolute path to THIS repo's
checkout ON THAT HOST. Every remote command cds here first,
so a wrong value silently points the run at the wrong repo.
Not used for the local host.
At most one host may have transport "local".
